summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Twisted Spoon Pokemon Discord Bot with Phase 3 (Battle System) and Phase 4 (Trading & Auction House) features. Backend API testing shows 100% success rate (22/22 endpoints working). Frontend testing confirms proper 'Twisted Spoon' branding, Pokemon sync expansion to 1,025 Pokemon, and all navigation functionality working perfectly.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warnings in console for table structure (th/td nesting)
design_issues.impact: Development warnings only - no user-facing impact

passed_tests: Pokemon sync status shows 1,025 Pokemon (expanded from 151)
Pokemon list retrieval with pagination working
Bot stats with updated fields - GET /api/stats/bot
All existing endpoints from previous iteration still working
Frontend shows 'Twisted Spoon' branding in header with sparkles icon
Dashboard displays Pokemon count of 1,025 (sync expansion confirmed)
Navigation works to all pages (Dashboard, Pokédex, Leaderboard, Type Chart, Trainers)
Pokédex shows 'Browse all 1025 Pokémon in the database'
Pokemon cards display with proper images, names, types, and generation info
Type effectiveness chart displays complete 18x18 matrix
Footer shows 'Twisted Spoon Bot' branding and 'Bot Online' status
All pages load quickly with proper data integration

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all pages and features working, minor console warnings only)
